title: chore(deps): update dependency babel-loader to v7.1.4 - autoclosed
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [babel-loader](https://github.com/babel/babel-loader) from `v7.1.2` to `v7.1.4`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.


<details>
<summary>Release Notes</summary>

### [`v7.1.3`](https://github.com/babel/babel-loader/releases/v7.1.3)

##### 🐛 Bug Fix

* Support webpack 4

---

### [`v7.1.4`](https://github.com/babel/babel-loader/releases/v7.1.4)

##### 🐛 Bug Fix

* Update code to read filename

---

</details>
